description: Summarizes the age at which registered passenger cars were deregistered using the status date minus first registration year. Returns average, median, and percentile ages at deregistration. Caveat: status date is not a complete lifecycle event log — it shows the current non-registered status date only.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()) AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL dereg_year = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato), age_at_dereg = dereg_year - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age_at_dereg >= 0 AND age_at_dereg <= 80 | STATS deregistered_cars = COUNT(*), avg_age_at_dereg = ROUND(AVG(age_at_dereg), 1), p10_age = PERCENTILE(age_at_dereg, 10), p50_age = PERCENTILE(age_at_dereg, 50), p90_age = PERCENTILE(age_at_dereg, 90) | LIMIT 1
